note: Lane-owner pattern works but requires very concise prompts to prevent premature termination. The lane-owner lifecycle (cartographer → architect → critic → executor → validator → handoff) is itself prompt-driven, leading to early exits when the LLM decides work is done after cartography. Had to iterate 3-4 times before the lane-owner completed its full lifecycle. Also, lane-owners launching other lane-owners causes confusion — the direct lane-owner → executor delegation is the correct pattern per user direction.
